info.title: Workday MCP
info.description: Power MCP tool server for Workday Web Services (v46.0). Enables Copilot Studio agents to interact with Workday HCM, Staffing, Benefits, Performance, Talent, Learning, Compensation, Recruiting, Absence Management, Time Tracking, Payroll, Financial Management, and Resource Management via SOAP-based web services.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Workday Web Services. Provides tools for querying and managing Workday HCM, Staffing, Benefits, Performance, Talent, Learning, Compensation, Recruiting, Absence, Time Tracking, Payroll, Financial Management, and Resource Management data.
Search and retrieve workers from Workday. Returns employee and contingent worker data.
Retrieve full employee record including employment, personal, and compensation data.
Retrieve personal information for an employee including biographic and demographic data.
Retrieve employment information including position, job, and status data.
Retrieve organizations by type (Company, Cost Center, Supervisory, Region, etc.).
Retrieve detailed information for a single organization.
Retrieve Workday server timestamp. Use as a health check or connectivity test.
Update work contact information for a person (email, phone, address).
Create or update contact information for a person.
Retrieve absence inputs and accrual data for workers.
Retrieve leave of absence request data.
Retrieve job application and candidate data.
Retrieve current benefit election data for workers.
Retrieve benefit annual rates for employees.
Retrieve in-progress and completed employee reviews.
Add a new goal or edit an existing goal for a worker.
Add anytime feedback for a worker.
Retrieve existing skills assigned to a worker.
Retrieve talent pool and membership information.
Add or remove skills for a worker.
Retrieve blended and digital learning courses.
Retrieve payee data for employees in external pay groups.
Retrieve worker or position costing allocations.
Retrieve company data including accounting details.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed

count.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50)

worker_reference.description: Worker reference ID (optional - returns all if omitted)

reference_id.description: Reference ID (optional - returns all if omitted)

organization_type.description: Organization type (e.g., Supervisory, Company, Cost_Center, Region)

worker_reference.description: Worker reference ID to give feedback about

remove.description: Set to true to remove the skill (default false)
